taxonomy: Tropilis carunculosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The classification of Tropilis carunculosa is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Gentianales, family Rubiaceae, genus Tropilis, and species T. carunculosa. Tropilis carunculosa is closely related to other plants in the Rubiaceae family, such as gardenias and coffee plants. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification of Tropilis carunculosa.
